title: Viners Barware 6 Piece Long Steel Drinking Straws with Brush Cleaner
features: CLASSIC BARWARE | Our long steel drinking straws are as stylish and modern as they are functional. They are expertly crafted and come elegantly packaged, making them the perfect gift for any occasion

NO MORE WASTE | Use these reusable straws guilt-free as you reduce your plastic waste in style. Cleaning is effortless, simply hand wash these straws using the pipe brush provided. This set includes 6 x drinking straws (23cm) and 1 x cleaning brush

MADE TO LAST | These straws are made to last. Made from rust-resistant stainless steel, these straws have a built-in strength and durability that ensures they will last for years to come. Hand wash only and wash before first use

BARWARE RANGE | Entertain, create and serve with flair and quality thanks to the Viners Barware Collection. Our range has all the tools to professionally entertain guests at home, from bottle storage to cocktail shakers, stirrers, and buckets

VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust barware made from the finest quality materials
description: From the manufacturer Round Silicone Ice Mould Giftbox Clamp Bottle Stopper Waiter's Friend Bottle Stopper Ice Tongs Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 5.0 out of 5 stars 4 1.0 out of 5 stars 1 4.5 out of 5 stars 162 1.0 out of 5 stars 1 4.0 out of 5 stars 29 Price £11.18 £ 11 . 18 £9.30 £ 9 . 30 £4.00 £ 4 . 00 £4.20 £ 4 . 20 £2.25 £ 2 . 25 Description This silicone ice mould will create 4 (4.5cm/ 13/4”) perfectly sphere shapes. Large pieces of ice melt slower, allowing your drinks to stay cooler without diluting. Ideal for Whiskey, Bourbon and Scotch. The Viners lever-arm bottle stoppers are designed to keep wine bottles airtight. A secure way to seal unfinished bottles on most neck sizes. Featuring a handy integrated crown cap bottle opener at the end of the lever arm. The double-lever hinge easily extracts the cork from the bottle in two swift steps. The neat, retractable blade removes foil protection from bottles. It also features a handy, easy to open bottle cap remover. The triangular shaped stainless steel bottle stopper with rubber sealing rings will create an air tight seal on a variety of different bottle shapes, keeping the contents fresher for longer. Deluxe brushed stainless steel ice serving tongs, with ridged edges for a secure grip on ice cubes or fruit.
